description: You are a broadcast technician preparing a radio show. Insert a 10-second mid-roll interlude into a continuous program by creating two tracks named 'Program' and 'Ad Break'. Import /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav onto the 'Program' track starting at 0:00, then split and shift the audio to create a gap from 0:10 to 0:20. Place /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav on the 'Ad Break' track to fill this 10-second gap (0:10 to 0:20) and set the 'Ad Break' track gain to -6 dB. Export the final mix to /home/ga/Audio/broadcast/final_mix.wav and save the session.
